title: Minecraft Bedrock Item Texture Atlas
description: The item_texture.json file defines the texture atlas for item textures. It maps texture names to texture file paths, allowing items to reference textures by name. Located at textures/item_texture.json in resource packs.

resource_pack_name.description: The name of the resource pack this atlas belongs to.

texture_name.description: The name of the texture atlas. Typically 'atlas.items' for item textures.

padding.description: The padding in pixels between textures in the atlas to prevent bleeding.

num_mip_levels.description: The number of mipmap levels to generate for the atlas.

texture_data.description: A collection of texture definitions keyed by texture name.

default_leather_color.description: The default color for leather armor textures when undyed in hexadecimal RGB format (e.g., '#A06540').

default_leather_horse_armor_color.description: The default color for leather horse armor textures when undyed in hexadecimal RGB format (e.g., '#A06540').

hex_color.description: A hexadecimal color string in the format '#RRGGBB'.

texture_entry.description: Defines a texture that can be referenced by items.

textures.description: Texture file path or array of paths for variants.

overlay_color.description: An optional color to apply as an overlay to the texture, specified as a hex string or RGB/RGBA array.

tint_color.description: An optional color to apply as a tint to the texture, specified as a hex string or RGB/RGBA array.
